violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store bakery boxes off floor in FOH area.--Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Cardboard box cut and re-used for single service item storage. Recommend using cleanable container.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
